Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: check typical P2P flow Create Requisition Approve Requisition Issue PO Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice to PO Release Payment Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1001 Sequence matches standard Create Approve Issue PO Receive Goods Vendor Invoice Received Match Invoice Release Payment Close All good

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Sequence Create Requisition Issue Purchase Order no approval before PO Vendor Invoice Received before Approve PR and before Receive Goods Release Payment before approval of PR before receiving goods before matching Approve Purchase Requisition after payment Receive Goods after payment Match Invoice to PO after goods receipt Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies PO issued without requisition approval invoice received before PR approval and before goods receipt payment released before PR approval before goods receipt before invoice matching also payment before matching should be after match So several issues

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Sequence Create Approve Issue PO Release Payment very early before receiving goods before invoice before match Vendor Invoice Received after payment Receive Goods after invoice Match Invoice to PO after goods receipt Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Payment released before receiving goods and before invoice also before matching payment should be after match Also invoice received after payment unusual Also goods receipt after invoice should be before So anomalies

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Sequence Create Approve Receive Goods before PO issue Issue Purchase Order after goods receipt Vendor Invoice Received after PO issue Match Invoice to PO after invoice Release Payment Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomaly Receiving goods before PO issued ie goods received without PO Also PO after goods receipt is out of order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we need to explain each anomaly and why problematic lack of control risk of unauthorized purchases mismatched invoices early payment risk fraud inventory discrepancies
